summary: Battle Game System (Phase 2D) testing complete. All 5 features pass - AI game generation with OpenAI, battle runtime, battle game flow, quiz runtime, and game type detection. Fixed critical bug: game_type field not being preserved in GameSpec model.

1_ai_game_generation_openai.details: POST /api/ai/compile generates valid battle game specs with game_type='battle', entities.enemy, battle_config. OpenAI GPT-5.1 used for generation.

2_battle_runtime_display.details: /play/:gameId with battle-type game shows BattleRuntime (data-testid='battle-runtime') with enemy character, health bar (100/100), taunt messages, battle UI

3_battle_game_flow.details: Full battle flow working: Start battle -> Answer question -> See damage dealt (Direct Hit!/Attack Missed!) -> Continue -> Victory on enemy defeat. Shows stats: Total Damage, Accuracy %, Max Combo

4_quiz_runtime_works.details: /play/:gameId with quiz-type game shows QuizRuntime (GameRuntime, data-testid='game-runtime') with title scene, start game button

5_game_type_detection.details: GameRuntimeSelector correctly routes to BattleRuntime for game_type='battle' and GameRuntime for game_type='quiz' based on spec.meta.game_type

bugs_fixed.issue: game_type field not preserved when creating/updating games
bugs_fixed.root_cause: GameMeta Pydantic model in /app/backend/models/game.py did not include game_type field
bugs_fixed.fix: Added game_type field to GameMeta model, added entities and battle_config fields to GameSpec model with extra='allow' config

bugs_fixed.issue: Existing battle game missing game_type and battle entities
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated game via PUT /api/games/:id/spec to add game_type='battle', entities, and battle_config

seed_data_creation: Updated existing battle game with game_type='battle', entities (Grammar Goblin enemy), and battle_config
context_for_next_testing_agent: Battle game system fully working. Key test IDs: battle-runtime, start-battle-btn, battle-scene, battle-option-{a/b/c/d}, battle-continue-btn, battle-victory-scene, battle-exit-btn. AI compile uses OpenAI GPT-5.1 via emergentintegrations.llm.chat. GameRuntimeSelector routes based on spec.meta.game_type. Backend models now support game_type, entities, battle_config fields.
